channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo weekly.

item.title: 📝 Zaneham/BarraCUDA (1266 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Zaneham

📝 Repository: Zaneham/BarraCUDA

📄 Descrizione: Open-source CUDA compiler targeting AMD GPUs (and more in the future!). Compiles .cu to GFX11/12 machine code.

⭐ Stelle: 1266

🍴 Forks: 48

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: c99 compiler cuda gpu ml

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T10:46:52Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-22T04:05:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 RightNow-AI/picolm (841 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: RightNow-AI

📝 Repository: RightNow-AI/picolm

📄 Descrizione: Run a 1-billion parameter LLM on a $10 board with 256MB RAM

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: arm embedded inference llm openclaw picoclaw quantization raspberry-pi risc-v

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-25T03:16:55Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:

📝 Repository: dazzyddos/lsawhisper-bof

item.title: 📝 enjector/microgpt-c (70 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: enjector

📝 Repository: enjector/microgpt-c

📄 Descrizione: Zero-dependency C99 GPT-2 engine for edge AI. Sub-1M parameter models train on-device in seconds. Organelle Pipeline Architecture (OPA) coordinates specialised micro-models — 91% win rates on 11 logic games with 30K–160K parameters. Composition beats capacity.

⭐ Stelle: 70

🍴 Forks: 5

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T21:08:15Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-21T19:12:57Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 nagibator-bradpittx94/CS2-Cheat-2026 (24 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nagibator-bradpittx94

📝 Repository: nagibator-bradpittx94/CS2-Cheat-2026

📄 Descrizione: CS2 cheat provides real-time aim assistance, recoil compensation, and configurable wallhacks for Counter-Strike 2. It includes triggerbot, ESP showing player locations and health, customizable keybinds, and a client that runs with the game without altering files.

⭐ Stelle: 24

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: counter-strike-2 counter-strike-2-settings cs2 cs2-cheat-wh cs2hacks hvh internal rage rage-game

item.title: 📝 8dks/moonlang (23 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: 8dks

📝 Repository: 8dks/moonlang

📄 Descrizione: MoonLang is a lightweight static programming language built with C++ and LLVM, featuring dual syntax styles (`: end` and `{ }`). Supports Windows, Linux, macOS and embedded platforms (ARM/RISC-V/ESP32), compiles to only 15KB-300KB, build full-stack applications from MCU to desktop.

⭐ Stelle: 23

🍴 Forks: 3

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: language moon moonlang programming-language

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T03:52:26Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-02-12T22:35:11Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: Midrags

📝 Repository: Midrags/SFF

📄 Descrizione: Open-source SteamForge Fetcher (SFF): A tool to set up games for Steam using Lua scripts, manifests, and GreenLuma. Enables DLC unlocking, multiplayer fixes, and Steam patching without cracking Steam. Features parallel downloads, backups, and more. Modified from original SMD by jericjan. Use at your own risk.
